content.en:
Ruins on the other side.

After a long journey, Ye Tian finally arrived here.

This is a special area located on the edge of Sector 72 in the eastern part of the Eternal Lands, and it does not belong to any of the regions of Sector 72, but belongs to a special territory outside of Sector 72.

There is almost nothing here, only the ruins of the other side, which also belong to the east.

At this time, there was no Heavenly Ancestor here.

After all, who would usually come here, even if it was a genius at the other side of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, they didn't dare to casually break into the ruins on the other side, they were also afraid of death!

Unless they obtained that kind of incomparably rare doppelganger material, made a nine-time bone transformation realm other side of the genius-level clone, and let the doppelganger enter the ruins of the other side, then they would come in.

But this is all too rare!

Because even if a nine-time bone transformation realm genius has obtained a clone, he is not willing to take risks!

During this period, he may even be the only Heavenly Ancestor who broke into the ruins on the other side.

Rumble!!!!

The tides of the ruins on the other side continued to emerge, and the terrifying fluctuations permeated the area beyond the ruins on the other side, causing countless time, space and space shocks.

When Ye Tian came here, he felt wave after wave of impact.

However, this impact is not too strong for him.

It is conceivable that once you enter the ruins on the other side, the impact will be terrifying!

Ye Tian first copied a replica body, his own replica body waited outside first, cultivating silently, and the second replica body went directly into the ruins on the other side.

If the Superior Eternal Gold is found, the second copy body will take the Grade Eternal Gold out and give the first copy body.

If the second copy body falls, the first copy body will continue to copy the body and continue to be sent in.

It's so convenient!

......

Ruins on the other side.

Ye Tian entered here.

He didn't know enough about the information here, and he didn't ask Junzu, otherwise there was no way to explain!

He said that he wouldn't come in, but he kept asking for information about the ruins on the other side, no matter how you look at it, there is a big problem!

That's why he didn't ask anything!

And there are too few Heavenly Ancestors who have entered the ruins on the other side, so it is difficult to obtain relevant information.

So, he directly tried to explore with the replica body, so as to obtain information, which might be easier.

The ruins on the other side resemble a long river that is constantly surging, and there are some swampy areas, as well as some strange islands and fragmented continents.

All in all, it looks like a chaotic place.

His copy talent is always on, probing his surroundings to prevent powerful creatures from approaching.

And he was also careful to find the best eternal gold.

Abrupt.

A whirlpool emerged, directly sucking Ye Tian's body over.

The point is, he couldn't resist and was directly sucked in.

In an instant, he had entered the inner spiral.

Rumble!!!!!

The pressure of terror struck, squeezing his flesh.

This horrific squeeze made his flesh crack continuously.

Finally!

Click!

His flesh was crushed by the whirlpool, dissipated into pieces.

......

Beyond the ruins on the other side.

Ye Tian continued to start copying his body.

And at this moment, he got the first information, the terrifying vortex was very terrifying, and it was fatal to him.

Therefore, when he explores the ruins on the other side later, he tries to avoid the whirlpool as much as possible, but not necessarily avoids it, which depends on luck!

After some time, the duplicate body was copied.

Then, he continued into the ruins on the other side.

This time, he was more careful.

"There are islands on the other side of the ruins, go to those islands first, and maybe you can find the best Eternal Ancient Gold!"

Thereupon.

He flew quickly and came to the nearest island.

The island isn't too big to look dangerous.

As a result, he thinks it's quite safe.

But soon, he was confused!

Just as he touched a vine, an invisible toxin poured into his body.

The next moment.

His flesh began to crumble.

"What's going on, a toxin like me can't even carry a seven-time bone transformation realm level genius!"

In just ten breaths, his body was completely shattered.

"This toxin is too terrifying, I'm afraid that even the nine Bone Transformation Realm other side level geniuses may not be able to withstand it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this time, he was surprised not to touch some plants, which may contain terrifying toxins.

Of course.

He didn't think that these toxins were really so terrifying, it was possible that they were so powerful in the ruins on the other side, if they came to the outside world, that is, ordinary toxins, they couldn't affect the Bone Transformation Realm, at most they could kill the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Subsequently.

After the copy of the body was copied, he entered the ruins on the other side for the third time.

This time, he was more careful, and although he entered the island again, he would not touch anything unless he obtained the best Eternal Gold.

With such care, he didn't run into danger soon this time.

He kept searching, but there was no good Eternal Gold on this island, but he found some medium Eternal Gold.

In line with the principle of not letting go, he also took away these medium eternal ancient gold, which can be regarded as a small gain!

Subsequently.

He left to take a look at a nearby ruin, where he might find the finest Eternal Gold.

As a result, just after arriving in the ruins, the danger came again.

This time it's not a whirlpool, it's not a toxin, it's wind.

The wind on the ruins blew Ye Tian, and he thought it was no big deal.

But soon, the wind blew inside his body, and his body began to crumble.

This time, the replica body fell again, and the medium eternal gold obtained fell directly down, unaffected by the wind.

Obviously, this wind only affects living beings.

......

"Die again, this time the experience gained is in the ruins on the other side, don't be blown by the wind, avoid it in advance!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Although I died once, it was an experience.

Subsequently.

He made another copy of his body, and re-entered the ruins of the other side.

Then, he found the medium eternal gold he had dropped, put it away, avoided the wind, and then went to a windless place in the ruins, and began to look for the best eternal gold.

He weaved through the ruins, cautious.

Finally, this time, he was lucky, and he encountered no other dangers, and he managed to find a piece of fine eternal gold.

"Found a piece of high-grade eternal gold, hurry away and give it away!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
